pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically generated pressing_plant_spec.txt and verifier.py explicit checks
setup_task.sh dynamically generated pressing_plant_spec.txt and verifier.py gap calculation
setup_task.sh dynamically generated pressing_plant_spec.txt and verifier.py fade length calculation
setup_task.sh dynamically generated pressing_plant_spec.txt explicitly specifies 44.1 kHz
verifier.py uses 8820 as the default tolerance (0.2s at 44100Hz) for exact gap scoring
verifier.py uses 22050 as the default tolerance (0.5s at 44100Hz) for fade out scoring
verifier.py uses 4410 as the default tolerance (0.1s at 44100Hz) for marker placement scoring
setup_task.sh script writing pressing_plant_spec.txt and export_result.sh checks
verifier.py uses 70 as the default score threshold for passing

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task creates a synthetic scenario by dynamically generating a pressing plant specification file during setup. The target track name ('Vinyl Pre-Master'), required gap (3.0s), required fade (2.0s), sample rate (44100Hz), and export directory ('/home/ga/Audio/vinyl_delivery') explicitly match the generated instructions in setup_task.sh. Tolerances for gaps (8820 samples), fades (22050 samples), and markers (4410 samples), as well as the pass threshold (70), strictly align with the scoring constraints implemented in verifier.py.
